name: refills-due
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). Per-user STATE-backed days-supply math. For each non-archived med: daysOfSupply = floor(quantity / scheduledPerDay(schedule)) where scheduledPerDay = schedule.times.length; only meds with daysOfSupply<=7 enter due[], sorted ascending, with urgency='critical' (<=2 days) or 'soon'. due[] carries {medId,name,quantity,daysOfSupply,refillsRemaining,urgency} — the exact RxRefillsPanel fields. A fresh assassin ctx owns no meds → {due:[],count:0,ok:true}. Degrade-graceful: STATE absent → {ok:false,'STATE unavailable'} (never a throw). The happy-path days-supply derivation (add med qty 6 + 2x/day schedule → 3 days → 'soon') is pinned by server/tests/pharmacy-lens-macros.test.js.
